zh.lifeSummary: 當William Stanley於1432年出生在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯時，他的父親Thomas Stanley27歲，母親Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley31歲。他於1471年12月7日之前與Elizabeth de Hopton在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1495年2月10日在英國米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年63歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾希爾 崔德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Stanley于1432年出生在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯时，他的父亲Thomas Stanley27岁，母亲Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley31岁。他于1471年12月7日之前与Elizabeth de Hopton在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1495年2月10日在英国米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年63岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾希爾 崔德。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Stanley was born in 1432, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas Stanley, was 27 and his mother, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, was 31. He married Elizabeth de Hopton before 7 December 1471, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 10 February 1495, in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Hill Hundred, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Stanley est né en 1432, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Stanley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Hopton avant 7 décembre 1471, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 février 1495, à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Hill Hundred, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

Lui sposato Elizabeth de Hopton prima del 7 dicembre 1471, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: William Stanleyが1432年にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスで生まれた時，父Thomas Stanleyは27歳，母Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanleyは31歳であった。1471年12月7日以前にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでElizabeth de Hoptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1495年2月10日にイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンで63歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアヒル ハンドレドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Stanley(이)가 1432년 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Stanley(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1471년 12월 7일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Elizabeth de Hopton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1495년 2월 10일 영국 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 힐 헌드레드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Stanley nasceu em 1432, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Stanley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Hopton antes 7 de dezembro de 1471, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1495, em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Hill Hundred, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Stanley родился в 1432 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Stanley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Hopton перед 7 декабрь 1471 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 февраля 1495 г. в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности хилл хундред, линколншир, Англия.
